testcase.name: runScenario

error.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of [[ChromeDriver: chrome on mac (81f98c250baf33fe407005a3124e0fd4)] -> css selector: span[class='userDetailsBalance']] (tried for 30 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.27.0', revision: 'd6e718d134' System info: os.name: 'Mac OS X', os.arch: 'aarch64', os.version: '26.0.1', java.version: '17.0.15' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 144.0.7559.133, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 144.0.7559.133 (7da823b1d59..., userDataDir: /var/folders/t1/rl_v5fcd6bg...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:59681}, goog:processID: 52859, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: mac, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:59681/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 144.0.7559.133, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 81f98c250baf33fe407005a3124e0fd4

testcase.error: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of [[ChromeDriver: chrome on mac (81f98c250baf33fe407005a3124e0fd4)] -> css selector: span[class='userDetailsBalance']] (tried for 30 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.27.0', revision: 'd6e718d134' System info: os.name: 'Mac OS X', os.arch: 'aarch64', os.version: '26.0.1', java.version: '17.0.15' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 144.0.7559.133, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 144.0.7559.133 (7da823b1d59..., userDataDir: /var/folders/t1/rl_v5fcd6bg...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:59681}, goog:processID: 52859, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: mac, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:59681/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 144.0.7559.133, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 81f98c250baf33fe407005a3124e0fd4 at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.WebDriverWait.timeoutException(WebDriverWait.java:84) at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.FluentWait.until(FluentWait.java:228) at util.ElementHelper.checkVisible(ElementHelper.java:24) at Pages.LoginPage.checkSuccessful(LoginPage.java:79) at Pages.LoginPage.login(LoginPage.java:91) at util.Hooks.beforeScenarioWithLogin(Hooks.java:36)
